analysis.semantic_summary: This parser processes Microsoft 365 collaboration events, specifically SharePoint and OneDrive file activities. It standardizes file operations like creation and sharing into OCSF format, capturing user actions, file metadata, and collaboration context for security monitoring.
optimization_opportunities: Add input validation for required fields
Implement error handling for timestamp conversion
Add field existence checks before transformations
analysis.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: microsoft_365_collaboration-latest 
-- OCSF Class: File Activity (1006)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T12:24:12.722401

-- Pre-declare locals for performance
local type = type
local tonumber = tonumber
local os_time = os.time
local string_format = string.format

-- Constant OCSF values
local OCSF_CONSTANTS = {
    class_uid = 1006,
    class_name = "File Activity",
    category_uid = 1, 
    category_name = "System Activity",
    activity_id = 1,
    type_uid = 100601,
    type_name = "File Activity: Create",
    cloud_provider = "Microsoft 365"
}

-- ISO8601 to epoch converter
local function iso8601_to_epoch(iso_str)
    if not iso_str then return nil end
    
    local pattern = "(%d+)%-(%d+)%-(%d+)T(%d+):(%d+):(%d+)"
    local year, month, day, hour, min, sec = iso_str:match(pattern)
    
    if not year then return nil end
    
    return os.time({
        year = tonumber(year),
        month = tonumber(month), 
        day = tonumber(day),
        hour = tonumber(hour),
        min = tonumber(min),
        sec = tonumber(sec)
    })
end

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize output with constants
    local output = {}
    for k,v in pairs(OCSF_CONSTANTS) do
        output[k] = v
    end

    -- Timestamp handling with validation
    local timestamp = record.TimeStamp
    if timestamp then
        output.time = iso8601_to_epoch(timestamp)
        if not output.time then
            output.time = os_time() * 1000 -- Fallback to current time
        end
    end

    -- Actor information
    if record.UserId then
        output.actor = {
            user = {
                email_addr = record.UserId,
                name = record.RequestedBy or ""
            }
        }
    end

    -- File metadata
    if record.FileName or record.ObjectId then
        output.file = {
            name = record.FileName or "",
            path = record.ObjectId or ""
        }
    end

    -- URL handling
    if record.SiteUrl then
        output.src_endpoint = {
            url = {
                url_string = record.SiteUrl
            }
        }
    end

    -- Activity name mapping
    output.activity_name = record.Operation or "Create"
    
    -- Target user
    if record.TargetUser then
        output.user = {
            email_addr = record.TargetUser
        }
    end

    -- Additional metadata
    output.message = record.Details or ""

    -- Final validation
    if not output.time then
        output.time = os_time() * 1000
    end

    if not output.activity_name then
        return nil, "Missing required activity name"
    end

    return output
end

-- Error handler wrapper
function safe_transform(record)
    local success, result = pcall(transform, record)
    if not success then
        return nil, string_format("Transform error: %s", result)
    end
    return result
end

test_cases.expected: Full OCSF output with all fields
